title: Relative to the commission on LGBTQ aging
summary: For legislation relative to the commission on LGBTQ aging. Elder Affairs.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Elder Affairs
Hearing scheduled for 04/14/2025 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in A-1
Referred, pursuant to an order adopted by the two branches, to the committee on Aging and Independence
Bill reported favorably by committee as changed, and referred to the committee on Senate Rules
Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for Thursday, November 13, 2025 with an amendment, substituting therefor a new draft, see S2711
Committee recommended ought to pass with an amendment, substituting therefor a new draft, see S2711
